tasks.label: Update Cmdlet Data
tasks.command: rm -rf docs && git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/microsoftgraph-docs-powershell.git docs && cd docs && git sparse-checkout set microsoftgraph/graph-powershell-1.0 microsoftgraph/graph-powershell-beta && cd .. && python3 scripts/parse_docs.py docs/microsoftgraph
tasks.detail: Clone Microsoft Graph docs and parse cmdlet metadata into public/data/

tasks.label: Deploy to GitHub Pages
tasks.command: git subtree push --prefix public origin gh-pages
tasks.detail: Push the public/ directory to the gh-pages branch

tasks.label: Deploy to GitHub Pages (Force)
tasks.command: git push origin $(git subtree split --prefix public):gh-pages --force
tasks.detail: Force push the public/ directory to gh-pages (use when subtree push fails due to history mismatch)
